text: I want to build an AI tutor that tracks my engagement and reshapes content—historical case studies, political debates, economic scenarios, and the occasional code example—into formats that fit my attention span. Like a social-media feed, it will serve the next concept exactly when I’m ready, making continuous learning as compelling as scrolling TikTok.
